items.description: Role metadata generated from Chef metadata.rb
items.notes: meta/main.yml already exists and is marked complete. Skipped to avoid overwriting.

items.description: Handlers for restarting redis-server and memcached services
items.notes: Handlers for restart/reload redis and restart memcached.

items.description: Redis and Memcached default variables (port, maxclients, loglevel, backuptype, syslog facility, directories)
items.notes: Source attributes/default.rb not present in workspace. Defaults written from migration plan: redis_port, redis_loglevel, redis_syslog_facility, redis_maxclients, directory paths, service names, memcached defaults.

items.description: Role-level vars (non-overridable values such as redis user, config paths, systemd unit name)
items.notes: OS-family specific package name mappings for redis and memcached (Debian/RedHat).

items.description: Redis instance config template — replaces redis.conf.erb + ruby_block patch hack; uses vault_redis_password for requirepass directive
items.notes: Converted ERB template to Jinja2. Source ERB not available in workspace; template written from migration plan analysis. Includes all effective runtime config: port, requirepass (vault_redis_password), maxclients, loglevel, syslog, persistence. Deprecated directives (replica-*) excluded — eliminates the ruby_block hack.

items.description: Memcached tasks — package install, service enable+start (replaces memcached_instance custom resource)
items.notes: Converted memcached include_recipe to package install + service enable/start tasks.

items.description: Redis tasks — package install, user/group, directories (/etc/redis, /var/lib/redis, /var/run/redis/6379, /var/log/redis), redis.conf.j2 template render, systemd service enable+start
items.notes: Converted redisio chain to: package install, user/group/directory setup, template deploy, service enable/start. ruby_block config-patching hack eliminated by writing clean template directly.

items.description: Main tasks entry point — orchestrates redis and memcached task includes
items.notes: Includes validate_credentials.yml first (as required), then redis.yml and memcached.yml.

items.description: Ansible Vault encrypted file storing vault_redis_password (replaces hardcoded 'redis_secure_password_123' in Chef recipe)
items.notes: Vault file with vault_redis_password. NOTE: Must be encrypted with: ansible-vault encrypt ansible/group_vars/all/vault.yml before committing.

items.description: Molecule verify playbook — checks /tmp/molecule_test/ paths for redis config, directories, service state, port 6379 and 11211
items.notes: Generated by MoleculeAgent. Verifies: Redis conf dir, data dir, log dir, run dir existence; redis.conf content (required directives present, deprecated directives absent); Memcached conf dir and file existence; port 11211 reference in memcached.conf. Service/port checks tagged molecule-notest for container safety.

items.description: Molecule no-op instance destroy stub (delegated driver)
Molecule no-op instance create stub (delegated driver)
Molecule scenario configuration — delegated driver, local connection (not docker/podman)
Molecule converge playbook — creates expected filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/ (redis dirs, config, memcached)
items.notes: Generated by MoleculeAgent. Recreates Redis and Memcached filesystem state under /tmp/molecule_test/. Includes credential variable injection, directory creation, redis.conf with all required directives (port 6379, requirepass, maxclients, loglevel, syslog, persistence), and absence of deprecated replica-* directives. No become, no include_role, no service tasks.
